note: Created tests/ffi_null_doublefree_concurrency.rs with 10 tests: null buffer send/recv, zero-length send/recv, double device_free, double close, and 4 concurrency tests (parallel create/free, connect/close on shared device, concurrent send/recv, barrier-synchronized mixed FFI calls). All 16 tests (including 6 harness smoke tests) pass in both debug and release modes.
